problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
